productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Red Top
description: Composition Red V-neck top made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves and Big Ben logo in crystal embellishments on the left chest Fit Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using a mild detergent Do not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron; do not iron directly on print/embroidery If “sporty” is your middle name, this T-shirt from united colors of benetton is designed especially for you. With a clean cut and a neat finish, this top looks great with jeans and shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8' and chest 33"
